entries.description: Pure completion-detection module (src/utils/gettingStartedDetection.ts): detectCompletion/selectExplorerMode/computeGettingStarted per D3, fs injected, VS Code-free; nodeDetectionFs adapter.

Dual-mode wiring in CustomSessionSetsView (buildGettingStarted -> SnapshotPayload.gettingStarted) + protocol ExplorerMode/GettingStartedPayload; mode flips on existing docs/session-sets/** watcher (no new watcher; baseline kept at 1).

Webview client.js dual-mode surfaces: no-folder CTA + 3-step Getting Started form shell (Full/Lightweight radio + parallel checkbox) greyed/checked per live D3 state; buttons inert (data-gs-action, not data-command). tree.css form styles.
Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (session-verification); see s1-verification.md.

Build project structure wired: structure-only no-prompt scaffold (renderStructureBootstrap + structureOnlyContext in consumerBootstrap.ts; ScaffoldDeps.structureOnly; buildProjectStructureNoPrompt in gitScaffold.ts) - engine files + start-here.md + tier-aware venv/router install, NO starter session set (D5: no title prompt; seeding a set would flip the dual-mode Explorer to list mid-form). Silent git init; folder-picker fallback when no folder open.

Plan import wired: planImport.ts split into importPlanFromFile + copyPlanningPrompt (injectable PlanImportUi for tests); dabbler.importPlan QuickPick now delegates to the same functions; form buttons drive each path directly.

Build session sets wired: buildSessionGenPrompt gains SessionGenPromptOptions.parallel (D4/D7 worktree + prerequisites decomposition guidance appended to authoring guidance); copySessionSetGenPrompt shared by command + form. Form-host protocol: GettingStartedActionMsg (5 actions, tier/parallel riders) routed via routeGettingStartedAction (pure, narrowing) + makeGettingStartedHandlers; CustomSessionSetsView refreshes after every handled action; client.js wires data-gs-action buttons w/ persistent gsState (tier/parallel survive re-renders) + disabled double-click guard. 16 new unit tests (676 passing).

Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (session-verification), 2 rounds: R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major - D7 worktree info note missing) DISPUTED as Session-3 scope per spec; R2 fed Session 3 spec text -> VERIFIED. Raw outputs: s2-verification.md / s2-verification-round-2.md; structured findings: s2-issues.json (resolution advisory-disagreement, resolved_in_round 2).
Step 3.5: authored ai-assignment.md (S1/S2 actuals backfilled with deviation note; S3 block + S4 recommendation from routed analysis via gemini-pro).

D6 env-var validation: pure providerKeyPresent(env) predicate in gettingStartedDetection.ts (System+User merge + reload-window rationale documented), providerKeyPresent field on GettingStartedPayload, host passes process.env, warning rendered under the Build button (Full tier only) with client-side radio toggling. Form HTML builders extracted from client.js to media/session-sets-tree/gettingStartedHtml.js (UMD-lite, mocha-testable) per the Set 052 pure-builders pattern. 21 detection tests + 11 builder tests pass.

D7 parallel-worktree info note: gs-note element under the parallel checkbox (git worktrees, merged back to main when sets complete), visible only while checked, client-side checkbox toggling; checked-vs-unchecked rendering tests ship per S060-S2-V1-001 suggestedTestOrCheck.

D8 static editor instructions: token-free getting-started.md.template added to the consumer-bootstrap bundle (5-step copy lifted ~verbatim from the operator SVG, typos fixed, {insert hyperlink} resolved to the tier-model GitHub URL); written to docs/dabbler/getting-started.md by BOTH scaffold paths; new commands/gettingStartedDoc.ts opens it as a markdown preview (workspace copy preferred, else bundled copy via globalStorage); CustomSessionSetsView auto-opens it once per extension session when a non-list Getting Started surface first shows.

Old Get Started path retired/repointed: WizardPanel.ts + webview/wizard.html DELETED; dabbler.getStarted re-registered in commands/gettingStartedDoc.ts (focuses the Session Set Explorer + opens the D8 instructions); dabbler.setupNewProject converged on the same no-prompt structure-only scaffold (tier QuickPick only - title/purpose/count prompts, git-init modal, worktree modal all retired); planImport + sessionGenPrompt registrations moved to extension.ts; viewsWelcome + package description + 6 doc references (quick-start, tier-model SSoT, repository-reference file map, ext README, workflow doc) updated; wizard.html cold-start-closure tests replaced with getting-started.md.template pins. Decisions flagged for verifier: WizardPanel DELETED (not folded), setupNewProject KEPT as palette entry. Also fixed 3 PRE-EXISTING tsc cast errors in gettingStartedActions.test.ts (S2 latent, broke npm-test compile).

Build + full test pass: esbuild compile clean (bundle + dist/templates incl. new getting-started.md.template); tsc --noEmit clean (after fixing 3 pre-existing S2 cast errors); TS unit suite 695 passing / 2 failing (both the documented pre-existing Set-026 stub failures: configEditor ViewColumn + notificationsSection); cold-start goldens regenerated for the new artifact (UPDATE_GOLDEN=1); drift guard OK; Python 1185 passed / 1 skipped (no ai_router changes).

Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (session-verification, complexity 65/70): round 1 VERIFIED, zero issues. Confirmed D6 host-driven env-key warning, D7 checked-only worktree note (S060-S2-V1-001 resolved with implementation + checked-vs-unchecked tests), D8 bundled/scaffolded/opened instructions doc, and the old-path retirement decisions (WizardPanel deleted, getStarted repointed, setupNewProject converged). Raw output: s3-verification.md. No sN-issues.json (clean round writes none).

Folded the two operator UAT-feedback changes into S4 before the gate: (A) buildSessionGenPrompt no longer inlines the project plan - the copied prompt references docs/planning/project-plan.md (path-aware-assistant contract, same as Set 048 review prompts); existence check retained so the reference is never dangling. (B) The form tier radio now rides the build-session-sets action (untrusted-narrowed like build-structure); the prompt exemplars + an operator-tier guidance line steer the planner to the selected tier (palette command without a radio stays generic Full). Tests updated/added: path-reference pin, 3 tier-option tests, tier-rider narrowing; 699 TS passing / same 2 pre-existing stub failures; tsc + esbuild clean.

Packaged dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.29.0.vsix (990.54 KB, 31 files) including the S4 fixes + extended CHANGELOG. NOTE: the 0.29.0 version bump (package.json + lock) and the base 0.29.0 CHANGELOG entry were found PRE-WRITTEN uncommitted in the working tree (authored out-of-band for the operator preliminary-UAT build); kept, extended with the S4 entries, date 2026-06-11, commit deferred to UAT pass per spec. Preliminary operator UAT: 10/11 rows pass, 1 untested (copy-plan-prompt). HANDED TO OPERATOR for the gate re-walk.

Operator UAT gate PASSED 2026-06-11: preliminary walk passed all rows (1 initially untested row - copy-plan-prompt - operator tested in follow-up: works fine; operator flipped its Passes themselves); the two feedback items were folded into the S4 build and the operator re-walked row 10 on the rebuilt 0.29.0 vsix (prompt references the plan without embedding - good to go) and explicitly authorized the Marketplace publish. Outcome recorded in 060-getting-started-redesign-uat-checklist.json (row-10 feedback note). PyPI NOT needed: ai_router packaged surface unchanged since published v0.16.0 (only Set 058 unpackaged CI script touched ai_router/ since).

Version finalized at 0.29.0: the package.json+lock bump and base CHANGELOG entry were found PRE-WRITTEN uncommitted (operator UAT-build prep); kept, CHANGELOG extended with the S4 changes (path-referenced decomposition prompt, tier threading, setupNewProject convergence/wizard removal), entry dated 2026-06-11. repository-reference.md release status updated: 0.29.0 UAT-passed + tag push; ALSO corrected stale held wording on already-published rows (ext 0.28.0 published 2026-06-09 run 27228430570; router v0.16.0 2026-06-05, v0.15.0 2026-06-02 - verified via gh run list) and the stale 0.13.3 committed-VSIX file-map row -> 0.29.0. change-log.md authored (final-session gate).

Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (session-verification), 2 rounds: R1 ISSUES_FOUND 1 Major (S060-S4-V1-001 - release docs said the vsix tag was already pushed although the push follows close-out) -> both docs reworded to the truthful pre-push state -> R2 VERIFIED. Raw outputs s4-verification.md / s4-verification-round-2.md; structured findings s4-issues.json (fixed, resolved_in_round 2). GOTCHA mid-session: the shell env LOST the provider keys (present at session start, present in Windows User registry throughout) - recovered by loading the User env into the process via PowerShell before routing.

change-log.md authored for the set (final-session gate): why the set existed, per-session ship list, the S4 UAT-feedback fixes, deferred Set 061 candidates (Explorer UX polish + Switch-tier action), verification + cost summary.
